BenchmarkS&P 500 (SPY)
RegimeIndex vs EMA100 (CAUTION line) and EMA200 (BULL/BEAR line). BULL=above both · CAUTION=above EMA100 only · BEAR=below both
Peer FilterSTRICT 22d: stock_22d_abs > sector_22d_avg > index_22d. All three must be positive. Driven by PRIMARY_RS_PERIOD=22. Matches rs_rebalance_v2.py STRICT_PEER_FILTER.
Turnover FilterMin avg daily turnover ≥ $5.0M (14-day rolling close×volume). Excludes illiquid stocks that look good on RS but can't be traded.
Sector Cap25% of top_n per sector — diversification guard
Sleeve_RSWeighted RS: each period's RS_Nd_Idx% × sleeve weight ÷ sum(weights)
ATR_Wt%Inverse-vol weight: 1/DailyStd, clipped [0.25×eq, 2.5×eq], renormalised to 100%. Low-vol stocks get higher weight for equal risk contribution.
SL_GradeA≤3% B≤5% C≤8% D≤12% F>12% — tighter = better entry quality
Sleeve A / US_AMonthly — 1st trading day of month. Large cap, low churn (~2-3 changes/month)
Sleeve B / US_BFortnightly — 1st & 3rd Friday. Mid-large cap, moderate churn (~4-6 changes)
Sleeve C / US_CWeekly — every Friday close. Small-mid cap, higher churn (~5-8 changes)
Sleeve D / US_DGlobal ETF Sleeve — Top 10 Country + Commodity ETFs ranked by RS vs SPY. Monthly rebalance. Diversifier + Bear buffer. In BEAR regime: move stock sleeve capital here.
Step 1Check regime banner above. In BEAR: deploy only 25% per sleeve, move rest to D
Step 2Choose sleeve for your risk profile: A=Conservative · B=Balanced · C=Aggressive
Step 3Enter ALL stocks in the sleeve. Weight by ATR_Wt% column (not equal weight)
Step 4On rebalance date: exit stocks no longer in list, add new entries, adjust weights
Step 5Use SL_Buy_Price as your hard stop. Grade A/B stops are ideal (≤5% risk per stock)
Step 6If a stock falls to its SL_Buy_Price intra-cycle, exit immediately — do not wait for rebalance
Generated19 May 2026 18:18 ET

79 rows

📋 Signal Guide & Methodology

FundaTechno Market Analysis v5.1 [US]
Generated
19 May 2026 18:18 ET
Data Source
Yahoo Finance (yfinance)
Universe
500 stocks | Benchmark: SPY
── RS SIGNAL SUMMARY ──
⭐ Strong Buy (all 5 peer filters)
37
✅ Buy
118
🔴 Sell
271
⬜ Neutral
111
── MULTI-TF SIGNAL SUMMARY ──
MST Buy
11
MST Watch
70
LST Buy
15
LST Watch
51
RS30 Buy
0
RS30 Watch
147
── SL QUALITY (Buy stocks only) ──
Grade A ≤3% (Ideal)
5
Grade B 3-5% (Good)
4
Grade C 5-8% (Acceptable)
20
── RS SIGNAL METHODOLOGY ──
RS Formula
(Stock/Stock_22d) / (Benchmark/Benchmark_22d) - 1
Buy Signal
RS_22d_Idx>0 AND RS_55d_Idx>0 AND RS_22d_Sec>0 AND RS_55d_Sec>0
Sell Signal
All four RS values NEGATIVE
Neutral
Mixed RS or insufficient data
Strong Buy (5 filters)
Buy + Stock_Ret55≥Sec_Avg + Stock_Ret55≥Ind_Avg + Sec_RS>0 + Ind_RS>0
── MST: MEDIUM SWING TRADING (20-60 days) ──
Duration / Target / SL
20-60 days | 20-25% target | ≤7% SL | 2.5x R:R
HTF (Weekly) pre-cond
Weekly RS(21)>0 AND Weekly RSI(14)>50
Entry (Daily) cond
Daily RS(55)>0 AND Daily RSI(14)>50 AND Supertrend=Buy AND Close>EMA(200)
Breakout trigger
Close > Highest High of previous 20 days
Stop Loss
Swing Low of last 20 trading days (price action)
Exit signals
Daily RS(21)<0 OR Supertrend=Sell OR RSI>90 (partial exit)
── LST: LONG SWING / MOMENTUM (60-120+ days) ──
Duration / Target / SL
60-120+ days | 30%+ target | ≤12% SL | 3x R:R
HTF (Monthly) pre-cond
Monthly RS(12)>0 AND Monthly RSI(12)>50 AND Revenue+ AND PAT+
Entry (Weekly) cond
Weekly RS(21)>0 AND Weekly RSI(12)>50 AND Supertrend=Buy AND Close>EMA(200)
Breakout trigger
Weekly Close > 20-week Swing High
Stop Loss
Swing Low of last 20 days (wider, structure-based)
Exit signals
Daily RS(55)<0 OR Supertrend=Sell OR RSI>90 (partial exit)
── RS30: WEEKLY MOMENTUM (FundaTechno Strategy) ──
Technical filters
Weekly RS(30)>0 AND Weekly EMA(10)>EMA(30) AND Price within 10% of 52W High
Fundamental filters
Sales QoQ>15% AND PAT QoQ>15% AND MCap>1000Cr (India)
Breakout trigger
Close > 20-day Swing High
SL (short-term holders)
Price below Weekly EMA(10)
SL (long-term holders)
Price below Weekly EMA(30)
Avoid
High pledge, high debt, increasing retail shareholding
── SUPERTREND INDICATOR ──
Algorithm
ATR period=10, Multiplier=3.0 (matches Pine Script ta.supertrend)
Buy direction
Price crosses above lower band (direction=+1)
Sell direction
Price crosses below upper band (direction=-1)
Used in
MST entry filter + LST entry filter
── SL GRADE & SCORE BONUS ──
Grade A ≤3%
+4 pts to Total_Score (Ideal — very tight stop)
Grade B 3-5%
+3 pts to Total_Score (Good)
Grade C 5-8%
+2 pts to Total_Score (Acceptable for MST)
Grade D 8-12%
+1 pt to Total_Score (Acceptable for LST)
Grade F >12%
+0 pts (Too wide — avoid unless LST with strong conviction)
Total_Score formula
RS_Score×0.6 + Fin_Score×2 + SL_Bonus
── SECTOR RANKING (RS_55d%, best to worst) ──
#1 Technology

── 📺 TRADINGVIEW WATCHLISTS ──
HOW TO USE
